channel.title: Mathematics on Om Arora
channel.description: Recent content in Mathematics on Om Arora

item.title: Differences Between Olympiad Math and Research Math
item.description: A reflection on the differences between olympiad math and research math, and what each prepares you for.

item.title: IITBMO 2026 — A Day of Quiet, Problems, and Perspective
item.description: Reflections from participating in the IIT Bombay Mathematics Olympiad 2026.
